title: T-067 — ROOT: FormulationEditor live panels (NutritionPanel + CostPanel + AllergenPanel + CompositionBar) (NPD-g)

# T-067 — ROOT/WORKFLOW: FormulationEditor live panels

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1 (live <50 ms recompute) + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md recipe_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:26-264 (RecipeScreen + side panels)

## Status: ROOT / WORKFLOW descriptor — NOT executable

This task is the umbrella for the live side-panel cluster of the formulation editor. It is decomposed into atomic slice tasks plus wiring + parity. Do NOT implement code under T-067 directly.

## Decomposition
- T-113 — NutritionPanel slice (recipe.jsx:26-65) — per-100g traffic-light bars
- T-114 — CostPanel slice (recipe.jsx:67-101) — cost breakdown + margin + target-price/yield inputs
- T-115 — AllergenPanel slice (recipe.jsx:103-122) — EU14 allergen presence badges
- T-116 — CompositionBar slice (recipe.jsx:230-250) — horizontal stacked composition bar
- T-117 — WIRING: mount all 4 panels into the formulation editor sidebar, share formulation state
- T-118 — PARITY: Playwright screenshot parity vs recipe.jsx prototype + axe accessibility

## Workflow
1. Slices T-113..T-116 run in parallel (independent components, each its own scope).
2. T-117 wires the slices into apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/page.tsx after all four slices land.
3. T-118 validates end-to-end parity + accessibility in browser.

## Out of scope here
- Ingredient editor table (T-066)
- E2E user journey (T-068)
- recomputeCalc engine internals (T-065)

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement code under T-067 — it is a root descriptor only.
- Each slice must keep scope_files ≤ 3 (one component + one test, optional CSS).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives per prototype_index translation_notes.
